installer.notes: This root remains developer/source-install only for now. install/install.sh provides a supported source install path (clone dev branch, submodule init, dependencies, bun link, fast CLI smoke). Release-backed binary installers, a Windows PowerShell installer, and an automatic updater are deferred to follow-up issue #24.

autoUpdater.notes: DarkFactory performs central managed setup sync through its GitHub App. Per-repo updater workflows verify that managed files are present and current enough to receive updates.
